segments.source_content: This plugin creates sitemaps for your site so that search engine crawlers can crawl your site more accurately.

translations.zh-CN: 该插件为您的站点生成站点地图，以便搜索引擎爬虫能更精准地抓取您的网站内容。

segments.source_content:
:::warning[production only]

This plugin is always inactive in development and **only active in production** because it works on the build output.

:::

translations.zh-CN:
:::warning[仅生产环境]

此插件在开发环境中始终处于非激活状态，**仅在生产环境生效**，因为它作用于构建输出结果。

:::

segments.source_content:
:::tip

If you use the preset `@docusaurus/preset-classic`, you don't need to install this plugin as a dependency.

You can configure this plugin through the [preset options](../../using-plugins.mdx#docusauruspreset-classic).

:::

translations.zh-CN:
:::tip

若您使用 `@docusaurus/preset-classic` 预设，则无需单独安装此插件作为依赖项。

您可通过[预设选项](../../using-plugins.mdx#docusauruspreset-classic)配置该插件。

:::

segments.source_content:
<APITable>

| Name | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `changefreq` | `string` | `'weekly'` | See [sitemap docs](https://www.sitemaps.org/protocol.html#xmlTagDefinitions) |
| `priority` | `number` | `0.5` | See [sitemap docs](https://www.sitemaps.org/protocol.html#xmlTagDefinitions) |
| `ignorePatterns` | `string[]` | `[]` | A list of glob patterns; matching route paths will be filtered from the sitemap. Note that you may need to include the base URL in here. |
| `filename` | `string` | `sitemap.xml` | The path to the created sitemap file, relative to the output directory. Useful if you have two plugin instances outputting two files. |

</APITable>

:::info

This plugin also respects some site config:

- [`noIndex`](../docusaurus.config.js.mdx#noIndex): results in no sitemap generated
- [`trailingSlash`](../docusaurus.config.js.mdx#trailingSlash): determines if the URLs in the sitemap have trailing slashes

:::

translations.zh-CN:
:::info

该插件同时遵循以下站点配置：

- [`noIndex`](../docusaurus.config.js.mdx#noIndex)：将导致不生成站点地图
- [`trailingSlash`](../docusaurus.config.js.mdx#trailingSlash)：决定站点地图中的URL是否包含尾部斜杠

:::

segments.source_content: You can configure this plugin through preset options or plugin options.

translations.zh-CN: 您可通过预设选项或插件选项配置此插件。

segments.source_content:
:::tip

Most Docusaurus users configure this plugin through the preset options.

:::

translations.zh-CN:
:::tip

多数Docusaurus用户通过预设选项配置此插件。

:::

segments.source_content: You can find your sitemap at `/sitemap.xml`.

translations.zh-CN: 您可在 `/sitemap.xml` 路径下找到生成的站点地图。
